message.content:
Use Playwright to test ALL dashboard pages on https://nexus-ai-silk-six.vercel.app. 

Steps:
1. Go to https://nexus-ai-silk-six.vercel.app/login
2. Login with email "testuser@nexusai-test.com" and password "TestPassword123!"
3. Wait for redirect to /dashboard

Then visit EACH of these pages, taking a screenshot of each and logging any network errors (4xx/5xx):

4. /dashboard (main dashboard) → save as 10-dashboard.png
5. /dashboard/documents → save as 11-documents.png
6. /dashboard/documents/upload → save as 12-upload.png
7. /dashboard/templates → save as 13-templates.png
8. /dashboard/surveys → save as 14-surveys.png
9. /dashboard/surveys/create → save as 15-create-survey.png
10. /dashboard/settings → save as 16-settings.png
11. /dashboard/settings/team → save as 17-team.png
12. /dashboard/settings/billing → save as 18-billing.png
13. /dashboard/settings/api-keys → save as 19-api-keys.png

For each page:
- Navigate to the URL
- Wait for the page to fully load (networkidle or at least 3 seconds)
- Capture any 4xx/5xx network errors with their full URL and response body
- Take a full-page screenshot
- Save screenshots to C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\test-screenshots\

At the end, provide a summary table with:
- Page name
- URL
- HTTP status
- Any errors found (network errors, console errors)
- Brief description of what rendered

Be thorough - capture ALL errors for every page.

content.text: I'll create a comprehensive Playwright test script to test all dashboard pages, capture screenshots, and log errors. Let me start by setting up the environment.

All testing is complete. Here is the full summary.

---

## Dashboard Pages Test Results Summary

All 10 screenshots have been saved to `C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\test-screenshots\`. The full JSON results are at `C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\test-screenshots\dashboard-test-results.json`.

### Summary Table

| # | Page Name | URL | HTTP Status | Network Errors | Console Errors | What Rendered |
|---|-----------|-----|-------------|----------------|----------------|---------------|
| 1 | **Main Dashboard** | `/dashboard` | 200 | None | None | Full dashboard with sidebar navigation, 4 stat cards (Documents Processed: 0, Active Surveys: 0, Responses Collected: 0, AI Analyses: 0), "Recent Documents" and "Recent Surveys" sections both showing empty states with CTAs. Footer shows "Documents used 3/10". |
| 2 | **Documents** | `/dashboard/documents` | 200 | None | None | Documents list page with "No documents yet" empty state, an "Upload Document" CTA button in the center, and an "Upload" button in the top-right header. Sidebar highlights "Documents". |
| 3 | **Documents Upload** | `/dashboard/documents/upload` | 200 | None | None | Shows message "Please set up your organization first." in the center of the page. No upload form is displayed. The sidebar highlights both "Documents" and "Upload". This is a **functional issue** -- the upload form is gated behind organization setup. |
| 4 | **Templates** | `/dashboard/templates` | 200 | **1 error: 404** on `/dashboard/templates/new?_rsc=1grla` | 1 console error: "Failed to load resource: 404" | "Extraction Templates" page with "No templates yet" empty state and a "+ Create Template" CTA. The page itself renders correctly but makes a background RSC (React Server Components) prefetch to `/dashboard/templates/new` which returns 404, indicating the "create new template" route does not exist on the server. |
| 5 | **Surveys** | `/dashboard/surveys` | 200 | None | None | "Surveys" page with "No surveys yet" empty state, a "+ Create Survey" CTA button in center and top-right. Sidebar highlights "Surveys". |
| 6 | **Create Survey** | `/dashboard/surveys/create` | 200 | None | None | Shows message "Please set up your organization first." in the center. No survey creation form is displayed. Same gating as the upload page. |
| 7 | **Settings (General)** | `/dashboard/settings` | 200 | None | None | Settings page with "General" highlighted in sidebar. Shows a **loading spinner** in the main content area -- the settings content did not finish loading within the wait period. This may indicate a slow API call or a hanging request for organization/profile data. |
| 8 | **Team Settings** | `/dashboard/settings/team` | 200 | None | None | "Team" page with "Manage your team members" subtitle. Shows "Members (0)" with an empty table (columns: Member, Role) and an "Invite Member" button. User avatar in top-right now shows "TU" initials (loaded after navigation). |
| 9 | **Billing Settings** | `/dashboard/settings/billing` | 200 | None | None | Fully rendered "Billing" page showing: Current Plan = Free ($0), Usage This Month (Documents processed 0/10, Surveys created 0/5), and "Upgrade Your Plan" section with Pro ($29/month) and Enterprise ($99/month) options. |
| 10 | **API Keys Settings** | `/dashboard/settings/api-keys` | 200 | None | None | "API Keys" page showing a warning card: "API Access Requires Pro Plan -- Upgrade to Pro or Enterprise to access the NexusAI API" with an "Upgrade Plan" button. Correctly gates API key management behind paid plan. |

---

### Issues Found

**1. Network Error -- Templates page (MEDIUM severity)**
- **Page:** `/dashboard/templates`
- **Error:** `404` on `https://nexus-ai-silk-six.vercel.app/dashboard/templates/new?_rsc=1grla`
- **Details:** The templates page triggers a Next.js RSC prefetch request to `/dashboard/templates/new`, but that route does not exist. This means the "+ Create Template" button links to a page that has not been implemented yet, or the route file is missing. The 404 response body is a full HTML page (the Next.js 404 page), not a JSON error.
- **Impact:** Users clicking "Create Template" will see a 404 page.

**2. Functional Issue -- Upload page blocked (LOW severity)**
- **Page:** `/dashboard/documents/upload`
- **Observation:** Displays "Please set up your organization first." instead of the upload form.
- **Impact:** Users cannot upload documents without first completing organization setup. This is likely intentional behavior but could be improved with a link/button to the organization setup flow.

**3. Functional Issue -- Create Survey page blocked (LOW severity)**
- **Page:** `/dashboard/surveys/create`
- **Observation:** Same "Please set up your organization first." message.
- **Impact:** Same as above -- users cannot create surveys without organization setup.

**4. UX Issue -- Settings page shows loading spinner (LOW-MEDIUM severity)**
- **Page:** `/dashboard/settings`
- **Observation:** The general settings page only shows a loading spinner and never renders content within the test window (waited ~5 seconds total). This could indicate a slow or failing API request for user/organization profile data.
- **Impact:** Users may see an indefinite loading state on the settings page.

### Overall Assessment

- **9 out of 10 pages** returned HTTP 200 with no network errors.
- **1 page** (Templates) had a 404 network error on a prefetched route (`/dashboard/templates/new`).
- **0 pages** returned 5xx server errors.
- The sidebar navigation is consistent across all pages with proper active state highlighting.
- The application correctly gates certain features behind organization setup (upload, create survey) and plan tier (API keys).
- The Settings general page has a potential loading/performance issue.
